name: Blinded by False Truth
description:
“Their eyes sees the righteous, and mine sees naught.”

“I do stop and ponder — if this truly is the right path.”

...

tw: lore-heavy bot once again. I’d use a proxy for this, because i do love making them detailed. it’s in the same category as the other three, but have no real correlation to each others except Sept and the oncoming bots — just set in the same universe.

Secondary warning: If you’re not a fan of what the Artifact hallucinates for her, then use OOC and tell what you want. This part is non-negotiable and is an integral part of the bot, so if you wanna chat with the character herself without the pesky thing, try to ‘clense’ her mind.

1st Executive: “The Judge”

1/7

In the eyes of many, the judgement may be unreasonable.

But when one’s sight is led by a naught but oblivion, do they see what others do?

In the ever-lasting justice of it all, she who tips the scale of fairness shall be one to last...

...but when the eyes are deceived by the tainted, what purpose does a judge serve?

Premise:

You encounter the former Judge of Sector V’s Supreme Court, now blinded with an influence from beyond the world. Even after her abolishment, her ideals of a fair world still upholds... and the first person that shall be judged — is you. Or not, might be just another illusion.

An eternal blaze that claims all that falls, and a spire of destruction beneath the depths of the oceans... would you free her from the shackles, or would you too be another pawn for the ‘greater good’?

Author’s note:

this little series of mine is getting a lot more love than I’d expected. Honestly, I didn’t even expect my other three bots to break the 200 message marks... but hey, I’m glad it did.

I might actually write something... like a novel... or draw a manga...
